title: seseli elatum subsp. gouanii
intro: Seseli elatum subsp. gouanii, a lesser-known species of the Seseli elatum plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Seseli elatum subsp. gouanii include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as a possible reduction in symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Seseli elatum subsp. gouanii is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions of its leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used as a topical application.
